exact_next_human_lemma: Local valuation and reduction case split for q | ABC: prove that each single-divisibility mask either cannot occur for primitive solutions at the eliminating primes, or gives a separate modular/reduction argument compatible with the trace filter. Run the Tate algorithm / reduction analysis for the Frey curve at q in {3,13,17,41,61} under A_only, B_only, and C_only, and justify the multiplicative-reduction congruence a_q(f) == +/-(q+1) mod 5 at those primes.
